title: Boma
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Otheruses|Boma}} {{Species |image=[[File:Boma_Beast.jpg]] |name=Boma |designation= |class=[[Reptile/Legends|Reptile]]{{CSWECite|I||Boma beasts}} |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=[[Color/Legends|Green]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=*Squat face with 2 horns and 2 [[Tooth/Legends|tusks]]"[[Operation: Shadowpoint]]" *Thick scales |lifespan= |origin= |habitat=[[Jungle/Legends|Jungle]] |diet=[[Diet/Legends|Carnivore]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |language= }} {{Quote|''Fnrrg! Gnrrarrg snnrruff snrooo!"
"''Grrarroooarr! Groogh gnarrgh! Whnuff.''"
"''Okay…I've just been made an honorary ''boma''. Let's ''ride''.''"
"''Gnrrooff.|Tott Doneeta and a boma|[[Tales of the Jedi 2|''Tales of the Jedi'' 2]]}} '''Bomas''' were ravenous beasts native to [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] and its moon [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]]. Although most bomas were generally small, there were some that were extremely large in size, as experienced by the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] and her companions while exploring the moon. They were dangerous predators and known to kill [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]], but they themselves were preyed upon by the [[Zakkeg/Legends|zakkeg]] beasts. Furthermore, they were, like most beasts of Dxun and Onderon, preyed upon by [[Drexl]]. ==History== {{Quote|Gnroo nrarrggaa!''"
"''Waroooon!|Tott Doneeta and a boma charge into Oron Kira's citadel|}} [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tott Doneeta]] used his [[The Force/Legends|Force]] ability to [[Animal bond|communicate with animals]] to use some bomas in order to get into [[Oron Kira]]'s citadel. During the [[Telosian Restoration Project|restoration]] of [[Telos IV]], several bomas were intended to be brought to the surface of Telos to help balance out the ecosystem. They may have been intended to control the populations of [[cannok]]s. At the time of the [[Galactic War]], there was still one [[Mandalorian clan]] existing that has bred the vicious bomas for centuries in their breeding pens.{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Bioanalysis|Boma Breeding}} ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Boma.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A boma in the Dxun jungle.]] Bomas were first introduced in [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (miniseries)|''Knights of the Old Republic'']] sub-series of [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] series of [[Star Wars comic books|comics]]. In the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', [[Meetra Surik]] learned a [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] called beast control by taming a large boma in the jungles of Dxun moon. In ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', bomas appear as player mounts from a Cartel Market pack. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of bomas}} *[[Tales of the Jedi 1|''Tales of the Jedi'' 1]] {{1st}} *[[Tales of the Jedi 2|''Tales of the Jedi'' 2]] *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' *[[Cartel Market|''Star Wars: The Old Republic'' Cartel Market]] *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Eternal Throne]]'' *"[[Operation: Shadowpoint]]" *[[Empire's End (audio drama)|''Empire's End'' audio drama]] *[[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]] ==Sources== *{{GalaxyCite|3|ComicScan|ComicScan: Marvelously Silly Aliens}} *{{InsiderCite|26|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 1}} *''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' *{{GalaxyCite|13|ComicScan|ComicScan: Telling Tales}} *{{SWMiniCite|set=Knights of the Old Republic|pack=Boma}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/Korriban|text=Korriban Creatures}} *{{TORweb|url=info/news/news-article/20180220|text=#SWTOR Cartel Market Specials: Week of February 19, 2018}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{ArtStation|username=skantron|url=artwork/lz6YV|name=[[Lucas Feld]]|text=KOTOR2}} {{Interlang |de=Boma#legends }} [[Category:Carnivorous creatures]] [[Category:Creatures of Dxun]] [[Category:Creatures of Onderon]] [[Category:Jungle and forest creatures]] [[Category:Reptiles]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]]
